creator: toga@puyo.org
text:
I mistaked that I sent older patch, so I fix it:

*** files/patch-ac.orig	Fri Oct 27 13:13:13 2000
--- files/patch-ac	Fri Oct 27 13:51:17 2000
***************
*** 3,9 ****
  ***************
  *** 0 ****
  --- 1,4 ----
! + gpl_canna.d(gpl_canna.mwd)     -gpl_canna---
! + gpl_canna_sub.d(gpl_canna_sub.mwd)     -gpl_canna_sub---
! + gpl_canna.fq(gpl_canna.mwd)     -gpl_canna---
! + gpl_canna_sub.fq(gpl_canna_sub.mwd)     -gpl_canna_sub---
--- 3,9 ----
  ***************
  *** 0 ****
  --- 1,4 ----
! + gcanna.d(gcanna.mwd)     -gcanna---
! + gcanna.fq(gcanna.mwd)    -gcanna---
! + gcannas.d(gcannas.swd)   -gcannas---
! + gcannas.fq(gcannas.swd)  -gcannas---

----
toga@puyo.org
